case_title: ISBITTS, STEVEN D. vs. SCOTT PLATEK, IND DBA FINE BEVERAGE & FOOD FEDER

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISBITTS, STEVEN D. AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT PLATEK, IND DBA FINE BEVERAGE & FOOD FEDER STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-12-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, DEFT. SCOTT PLATEK PRESENT, PLTF. STEVEN D. ISBITTS NOT PRESENT. THERE BEING NO EVIDENCE BEFORE COURT BY PLTF, DEFT'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS CASE WAS GRANTED BY THE COURT IN FURTHERANCE OF JUSTICE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER COURT ORDER - JUDGE WICK
